summary: LevelUp Library+ tested end-to-end: 5 backend tests for library apps CRUD (list/purchase/refund/404), 5 for gratitude (create/list/validation/truncation), plus full Playwright UI flow for purchase modal → unlocked modal → My Library → all 5 mini-apps (anxiety breathe+ground, posture 60s sequence, affirmations fav, cold-shower timer, gratitude journal save+history). All 13/13 pytest passed. All UI flows passed. Mocked purchase persists correctly to profile.purchased_apps and is clearly marked MOCKED in UI.
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED purchase clearly shown in purchase modal ('⚠ MOCKED — no real payment yet.') and Add-tab footer ('MOCKED purchase — no real charge. Wire Stripe later.') — good UX.
Library+ catalog hard-coded in server.py (LIBRARY_APPS) — fine for MVP but consider moving to DB when Stripe is wired up.
purchase_app uses $addToSet so duplicate purchases are idempotent (verified via test_purchase_idempotent).
Refund endpoint has no auth/guardrails — fine for dev; lock down before production.
No Mongo _id leakage observed in any library/gratitude responses.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily purchased all 5 apps during UI test to open mini-apps directly, then refunded all 5 and cleaned up after tests to restore fresh state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Library+ + 5 mini-apps fully verified. Purchase is MOCKED (no Stripe). profile.purchased_apps now empty (refunded after tests). Gratitude collection contains a few TEST_ entries from prior runs — safe to leave. Reusable tests at /app/backend/tests/test_library_gratitude.py.
